// 127ダリオ家、相手＝ダリオ　夜

...Discarded tissues after wiping away the fluids of two people. For me and Dario,
who can only masturbate while thinking of Elly, there is an unbearable, manly
difference between us........

Ugh, Dario's bed...it's as filthy as ever... I really don't wanna search a place like
this... Huh? What's that under the bed?

Eek! Wh-what is this...? A girl's underwear...? Wh-why is this here...!? Ugh, it
stinks!? It's completely soaked with the smell of semen...!

...It's faded, so I can't say for sure, but... Now that I think about it, there was
an incident a while ago where Mana and Elly's underwear got stolen... I'm starting to
remember that time now...

We found Elly's underwear right away, but... come to think of it, I don't think
Mana's turned up. That girl is so kind, she probably kept quiet to avoid causing any
more of a fuss.

Damn it, that bastard Dario...! Taking advantage of Mana's kindness to do something
like this...! ...I'll take care of this bitch myself, ugh, it's, dirty...!

イベントID(もしくは名称) = SexEV

Dario loves drinking alcohol so much that just showing his face at the tavern isn't
enough for him, so he keeps a sake barrel at home like this.

Ever since Dario's father passed away, his life has fallen apart. He really needs
someone to keep an eye on him... I wish someone would take on that role.

...Elly's homemade dishes started appearing at Dario's house too. It's only natural
for a girl to cook for her boyfriend... So why do I feel so awful about it........

...It seems Elly doesn't even have the time to make meals for Dario anymore. That
girl already belongs to the whole village... She doesn't have time to pay attention
just to Dario and me anymore...

...It seems Elly cooked for him after spending the night with him. A meat stew he'd
probably like... ...Ugh, I'm so jealous...
// ダリオ１７無効　村長２ガキ３モブアナル4，複数モブ5 789
